dependent_variables.variable_name: vote decision in the 2002 Brazilian presidential election

classification.sample_size_quote: The empirical base that grounds the analysis is the ESEB (Brazilian Electoral Study), a survey conducted on a sample – probabilistic without substitution, with 3 selection stages (municipality, census sector and domicile), with a sampling error of 2% – of 2,513 voters throughout the country between October 31 and December 28, 2002.
classification.brief_justification: O corpo de "Relevant Factors for the Voting Decision in the 2002 Presidential Election: An Analysis of the ESEB (Brazilian Electoral Study) Data" analisa dados quantitativos, administrativos ou de survey com procedimento empírico próprio ou secundário claramente descrito. A classificação é conservadora: detalhes causais, variáveis e identificação só foram preenchidos quando o texto os declarou de forma explícita.
